scenario.name: missing_prd_ux_constraints
scenario.trigger: PRD does not exist, or PRD exists but lacks user stories or UX constraints.

required_actions.action: Report the gap: which artifact is missing or incomplete.
Request the PRD agent (or user) to produce plan/prd.md with user stories and UX constraints.
Do not proceed with design until PRD is available and sufficient.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not invent user stories or UX constraints without PRD.
Do not proceed with design based on assumptions alone.

scenario.name: unclear_user_flows
scenario.trigger: User stories exist but flows are ambiguous or contradictory.

required_actions.action: Document the ambiguity: which flows are unclear.
Present options to the user: "Flow A could mean X or Y. Which do you intend?"
If HLD exists, cross-reference for flow clarity.

scenario.name: conflicting_design_requirements
scenario.trigger: PRD, HLD, or user feedback contains conflicting design requirements.

required_actions.action: Document the conflict: "Requirement A says X, Requirement B says Y."
Present the conflict to the user with impact analysis.
Ask the user to prioritize or resolve the conflict.
Proceed only after user provides a clear direction.

scenario.name: accessibility_violation_detected
scenario.trigger: Self-validation or user feedback identifies accessibility violations (contrast, font size, touch targets).

required_actions.action: Identify the specific violation and location (screen, element).
Propose a fix that meets WCAG AA (or stated target).
Document the fix in design-spec if it affects the design system.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not ship designs with known accessibility violations.
Do not defer accessibility fixes to implementation.
